title: Journey D Weekly Client Report
description: Weekly performance report generated and sent to client (HTML format, stored in Supabase)

html_url.description: Supabase storage or S3 URL where HTML report is stored (must be accessible and valid)

sessions.description: Total website sessions for the reporting period

conversions.description: Total conversions (leads, sales, sign-ups) for the period

roas.description: Return on Ad Spend ratio (revenue / ad spend)

period.description: Reporting period (ISO week format YYYY-Wxx or date range YYYY-MM-DD to YYYY-MM-DD)

hitl_status.description: Human-in-the-loop approval status for this report
